# SoloStack

> Hands-on reviews of AI and automation tools for one-person businesses — funnel builders, email marketing platforms, AI writing and productivity tools. Every tool is tested on real business tasks (usually on its free plan) before review.

Reviews state which tool fits which situation, what the free plan actually includes, current pricing at time of testing, and observed limitations. No income claims. Affiliate relationships are disclosed at the top of each affected article.

## Pages

- [Home](/) : latest reviews and comparison guides
- [About](/about) : testing methodology
- [Disclosure](/disclosure) : affiliate relationship policy
